ddls:
CREATE TABLE "happiness_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Country name */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "life_ladder" REAL /* Life ladder score reflecting subjective well-being */,
  "log_gdp_per_capita" REAL /* Log of GDP per capita */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Score of social support */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy at birth */,
  "freedom_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices score */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score */,
  "corruption_perception" REAL /* Perception of corruption score */,
  "positive_affect" REAL /* Positive affect score */,
  "negative_affect" REAL /* Negative affect score */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "survey_year" INTEGER /* Year the survey was conducted */,
  "urban_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "rural_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in rural areas */,
  "youth_unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate among youth (ages 15-24) */,
  "elderly_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population aged 65 and over */,
  "income_inequality" REAL /* Gini coefficient or other measure of income inequality */,
  "health_expenditure_per_capita" REAL /* Government health expenditure per capita */,
  "education_expenditure_per_capita" REAL /* Government education expenditure per capita */,
  "internet_usage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population with internet access */,
  "life_satisfaction_score" REAL /* Overall life satisfaction score */,
  "environmental_quality_score" REAL /* Score reflecting environmental quality */,
  "political_stability_score" REAL /* Score reflecting political stability */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 100,000 population */,
  "social_trust_score" REAL /* Score reflecting social trust */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_metrics_country_name FOREIGN KEY ("country_name") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_metrics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES metrics_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "government_form" TEXT /* Form of government */,
  "gdp_total" REAL /* Total GDP of the country */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient of income inequality */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Total urban population */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Total rural population */,
  "youth_population" INTEGER /* Total population aged 15-24 */,
  "elderly_population" INTEGER /* Total population aged 65 and over */,
  "internet_users" INTEGER /* Total number of internet users */,
  "health_expenditure" REAL /* Total government health expenditure */,
  "education_expenditure" REAL /* Total government education expenditure */,
  "political_stability_index" REAL /* Index of political stability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "total_gdp" REAL /* Total GDP of the region */,
  "average_life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in the region */,
  "average_healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Average healthy life expectancy in the region */,
  "average_income_inequality" REAL /* Average income inequality in the region */,
  "average_education_expenditure" REAL /* Average government education expenditure per capita */,
  "average_health_expenditure" REAL /* Average government health expenditure per capita */,
  "average_internet_usage" REAL /* Average percentage of internet users */,
  "average_political_stability" REAL /* Average political stability index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source's website or data repository */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the source was last updated */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_reliability_score" REAL /* Score reflecting the reliability of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, supervisor) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Numeric value representing the user's access level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
